title: 1,037 Marilyn Monroes Gathered in One Place to Break a World Record
script: 1,037 Marilyn Monroes? In California, a single city talked one thousand and thirty-seven people into the same white dress, the same platinum wig, and the same over-the-shoulder pose — all at once. The goal: smash the Guinness World Record for the largest gathering of Marilyn Monroe look-alikes. Picture a thousand identical Marilyns spilling down a city block on her 100th birthday, every one of them frozen mid-pose. Judges counted heads, checked costumes, and made it official: a brand-new world record. Some even flew in from other states just to stand in a crowd of identical blondes, all posing for the exact same photo. It is equal parts iconic and completely unhinged. So how do you even count 1,037 Marilyn Monroes without losing track of which one is which?
